steps.t: Bâr Tarnaher is north-west of Henneth Annûn. The Rangers of Bâr Tarnaher have launched many attacks upon the Orcs from that ruin, and may know of any …
Legolas is at the ruin of Bâr Tarnaher, in North Ithilien. You have come to the ruin of Bâr Tarnaher, but Legolas has found something amiss.
Bregaras is at Bâr Tarnaher, north-west of Henneth Annûn in North Ithilien.
Rangers of Ithilien hid supply caches east and north of Bâr Tarnaher. Bregaras asked you to retrieve Ranger supply caches and bring them back to Bâr T…
Bregaras asked you to leave the supplies you collected at Bâr Tarnaher.
Gimli is at Bâr Tarnaher, in North Ithilien.
Unréth and Maegur are at Bâr Tarnaher. Gimli noticed that the soldiers that came with you to Bâr Tarnaher have become increasingly troubled.
Aragorn is at Henneth Annûn, in North Ithilien.
Soldiers of Aragorn's host can be found at Henneth Annûn. Aragorn asked you to try and bolster the courage of his men.
Aragorn is at Henneth Annûn, in North Ithilien.
Aragorn is at his camp on the border between Dagorlad and North Ithilien.
